description_long: This is a single brown slip-on loafer made of worn leather with visible creases and scuff marks, indicating significant use. The upper is smooth with a rounded toe and lacks any visible laces or fasteners, giving it a classic, minimalist appearance. The stitching is prominent along the sides and around the toe box, with some fraying and discoloration from wear. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter, possibly synthetic or fabric material, which is visible at the opening and shows signs of use. The heel is low and the sole is thin, with the back showing some flattening and wear, especially at the heel edge. Overall, the shoe has a distressed, well-used look, suitable for casual urban environments.
description: A brown, slip-on leather loafer with visible wear, creasing, and frayed stitching, featuring a simple, classic design and a low, worn heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, worn leather upper, and prominent stitching around the toe box.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, creased leather, visible stitching, and the low, slightly flattened heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the worn heel, visible interior lining, and the back seam with some scuffing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same creased leather, stitching, and overall worn condition.
